email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Marketing Intern bij Cardo Hotels. Uw focus op merkbeleving, design en culturele programmering sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring in digitale marketing en contentcreatie.

Bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte blogcontent en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Daarnaast heb ik met mirook.com een volledige website ontworpen en geoptimaliseerd voor zowel traditionele als AI-gestuurde zoekmachines. Ik ben vaardig in sociale media, contentbeheer en basisanalysetools zoals Google Analytics en SEMrush.

Hoewel mijn Nederlands nog B1 is, volg ik lessen om dit te verbeteren. Ik werk vloeiend in het Engels en Turks. Ik ben leergierig, proactief en klaar om bij te dragen aan uw marketingcampagnes.

Ik voeg mijn CV en motivatiebrief bij. Ik hoop u snel te spreken.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear team,

I am very excited to apply for the Marketing Intern position at Cardo Hotels. Your focus on brand experience, design, and cultural programming aligns perfectly with my background in digital marketing and content creation.

At Episto, I handle on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted blog content, and manage WordPress sites. I also designed and optimized mirook.com for both traditional and AI-powered search engines. I am skilled in social media, content management, and basic analytics tools like Google Analytics and SEMrush.

While my Dutch is at B1 level, I am taking classes to improve. I am fluent in English and Turkish. I am eager to learn, proactive, and ready to contribute to your marketing campaigns.

I have attached my CV and cover letter. I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste heer/mevrouw,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van Marketing Intern bij Cardo Hotels. Uw missie om ervaringsgerichte plekken te creëren voor welzijn en bedrijfscultuur spreekt mij zeer aan. Als junior digital marketer met een technische achtergrond in webdesign en SEO, geloof ik dat ik een waardevolle bijdrage kan leveren aan uw merk.

In mijn huidige rol bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte blogcontent en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Ik gebruik tools zoals SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Google Search Console om prestaties te monitoren en campagnes te optimaliseren. Daarnaast heb ik met mirook.com een volledige website ontworpen en geoptimaliseerd voor zowel traditionele als AI-gestuurde zoekmachines, inclusief gestructureerde data en sociale mediaintegratie.

Uw nadruk op merkbeleving, design en culturele programmering sluit aan bij mijn ervaring met contentcreatie en sociale media. Ik ben vaardig in het maken van boeiende content voor platforms zoals Instagram, Facebook en LinkedIn, en ik heb ervaring met Canva voor beeldbewerking. Mijn analytische vaardigheden stellen mij in staat om datagestuurde inzichten te leveren voor campagnes.

Hoewel mijn Nederlands nog B1 is, volg ik actief lessen om dit te verbeteren. Ik werk vloeiend in het Engels en Turks. Ik ben leergierig, proactief en werk graag zowel zelfstandig als in teamverband.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn vaardigheden in te zetten voor Cardo Hotels en bij te dragen aan uw marketinginspanningen. Ik hoop u snel te spreken.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am very excited to apply for the Marketing Intern position at Cardo Hotels. Your mission to create experiential places for wellbeing and corporate culture strongly resonates with me. As a junior digital marketer with a technical background in web design and SEO, I believe I can make a valuable contribution to your brand.

In my current role at Episto, I handle on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted blog content, and manage WordPress sites. I use tools like SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Google Search Console to monitor performance and optimize campaigns. Additionally, I designed and optimized mirook.com for both traditional and AI-powered search engines, including structured data and social media integration.

Your emphasis on brand experience, design, and cultural programming aligns with my experience in content creation and social media. I am skilled in creating engaging content for platforms like Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn, and I have experience with Canva for image editing. My analytical skills enable me to provide data-driven insights for campaigns.

While my Dutch is at B1 level, I am actively taking classes to improve. I am fluent in English and Turkish. I am eager to learn, proactive, and enjoy working both independently and as part of a team.

I look forward to applying my skills at Cardo Hotels and contributing to your marketing efforts. I hope to speak with you soon.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- Digital marketing intern with hands-on SEO, content creation, and social media experience
- Built and optimized a full WordPress site (mirook.com) with structured data and social media integration
- Proficient in analytics tools (Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs) for campaign insights
- Skilled in creating engaging content for social media (Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn) and blogs
- Fluent in English and Turkish; learning Dutch (B1); proactive and quick to learn new tools
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · Content · Social Media
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in SEO, content creation, and social media. At Episto, I run on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted blog content, and manage WordPress sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I designed and built a multi-page website with structured data and social media integration, improving visibility across search engines. Skilled in content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting. Quick to pick up new tools and platforms. Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building, social media content & integration
- SEO & digital marketing: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Web & design: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social media: content creation for Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn; monitoring engagement
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & Social Media (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
